Usage:  circleci artifacts [<run-id>] [flags]

Flags:
  -b, --branch string     Branch for run inference (default: current branch)
  -d, --download string   Download artifacts into this directory
  -j, --job int           Scope to a single job number
      --jq string         Process values from the response using jq syntax
      --json              Output as JSON
      --project string    Project slug (e.g. gh/org/repo); used with --job, defaults to git remote
